aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.features.objectDetection.name: Object detection
aiSettings.features.objectDetection.desc: Detect people, vehicles, and common objects in camera streams.
aiSettings.features.faceRecognition.name: Face recognition
aiSettings.features.faceRecognition.desc: Match enrolled faces across cameras. Processes biometric data under GDPR Article 9 and the EU AI Act.
aiSettings.features.lpr.name: Licence plate recognition
aiSettings.features.lpr.description: Read vehicle licence plates in live and recorded video.
Detect loitering, crowd formation, and abnormal motion patterns.
aiSettings.features.semanticSearch.name: Semantic search
aiSettings.features.semanticSearch.descr: Natural-language search across recorded footage (e.g. "red jacket near exit").
aiSettings.features.customModels.name: Custom models
aiSettings.features.customModels.descrip: Run sandboxed custom inference models on your streams.
aiSettings.enableFaceRecognitionAck.body: Face recognition processes biometric data. Before enabling this feature you must confirm that your organisation has a lawful basis under GDPR Article 9 and has completed an EU AI Act Article 27 fundamental-rights impact assessment.
aiSettings.enableFaceRecognitionAck.chec: I confirm my organisation has a lawful basis under GDPR Article 9 and has completed an EU AI Act Article 27 impact assessment.
aiSettings.disableFaceRecognitionWarning: This will suspend all face matching across your cameras. Enrolled faces remain in the vault unless you purge them separately.
aiSettings.complianceBanner.title: Regulated AI feature
aiSettings.complianceBanner.body: Face recognition processes biometric data under GDPR Article 9 and the EU AI Act. Review your obligations before enabling any feature.
aiSettings.retention.heading: Retention policy
faceVault.title: Face Vault
faceVault.disabledHint: Enable face recognition to manage the face vault.
faceVault.summary.heading: Vault summary
faceVault.columns.subject: Subject
faceVault.list.errorUnauthorized: You do not have permission to view this face vault.
faceVault.empty.title: No enrollments yet
faceVault.empty.body: Add a face enrollment once your organisation has established a lawful basis for processing biometric data.
faceVault.addEnrollment.title: Add face enrollment
faceVault.addEnrollment.name: Subject name
faceVault.addEnrollment.legalBasisHint: Select the GDPR basis under which this biometric data is processed.
faceVault.addEnrollment.consentDisclosur: This system uses automated facial recognition technology to identify enrolled individuals in camera feeds. By enrolling a face, you confirm that (a) you have obtained the data subject's explicit, informed, freely-given consent for biometric processing under GDPR Article 9(2)(a), or (b) you are relying on a lawful basis under applicable national law implementing GDPR Article 9(2)(g) (substantial public interest). Enrolled face data is stored as a mathematical embedding, not as a photograph. Embeddings are encrypted at rest and automatically deleted after the retention period you configure. You may withdraw consent or request deletion at any time.
faceVault.addEnrollment.consentCheckbox: I confirm I have a lawful basis for enrolling this individual's biometric data
faceVault.addEnrollment.imageHint: Stub only — no image is uploaded yet (KAI-282).
faceVault.addEnrollment.errors.consentRe: Consent must be captured before the enrollment can be saved.
faceVault.deleteConfirm.title: Delete {{name}}
faceVault.deleteConfirm.body: This will permanently delete the enrollment and its embedding. Audit events will be retained. This action cannot be undone.
faceVault.revokeConsent.title: Revoke consent for {{name}}
faceVault.revokeConsent.body: The enrollment will be marked as consent-revoked and excluded from face matching. It will remain in the vault (for audit) until deleted.
faceVault.purge.title: Emergency purge
faceVault.purge.warning1: This will permanently delete face vault data and cannot be undone.
faceVault.purge.warning2: Only use this when required by a Data Protection Authority, GDPR Article 17 request, or incident response.
faceVault.purge.twoPersonBody: A purge of biometric data requires approval from a second administrator with purge-approve permission. The proposer cannot be the approver.
faceVault.purge.approverSamePrincipal: The proposer and approver cannot be the same person.
faceVault.thumbnail.revealAriaLabel: Reveal source image for {{name}} (logged as consent.record_viewed)
